SEARCH
Package dev.jeka.core.api.system

Class JkProcResult

java.lang.Object
dev.jeka.core.api.system.JkProcResult
public class JkProcResult extends Object
Represents the result of a process execution.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    assertSucceed()
    Asserts that the process execution succeeded.
    int
    getExitCode()
    Returns the exit code of the process execution.
    byte[]
    getStderr()
    Returns the stderr generated by the executed process.
    String
    getStderrAsString()
    Returns the output generated by the executed process as a string, assuming UTF-8 encoding.
    byte[]
    getStdout()
    Returns the stdout generated by the executed process.
    List<String>
    getStdoutAsMultiline()
    Returns the output generated by the executed process as a list of strings, where each string represents a line of output.
    String
    getStdoutAsString()
    Returns the output generated by the executed process as a string, assuming UTF-8 encoding.
    boolean
    hasCollectedStderr()
    Returns true if the executed process has collected stdErr.
    boolean
    hasCollectedStdout()
    Returns true if the executed process has collected stdout.
    boolean
    hasSucceed()
    Returns true if the process execution succeeded.

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Method Details

    • getExitCode

      public int getExitCode()
      Returns the exit code of the process execution.

    • hasSucceed

      public boolean hasSucceed()
      Returns true if the process execution succeeded. It Returns false if the exit code differs from 0.

    • assertSucceed

      public void assertSucceed()
      Asserts that the process execution succeeded. Throws an IllegalStateException if the process execution failed (i.e. the exit code is not 0).

    • getStdout

      public byte[] getStdout()
      Returns the stdout generated by the executed process.

    • getStderr

      public byte[] getStderr()
      Returns the stderr generated by the executed process.

    • hasCollectedStdout

      public boolean hasCollectedStdout()
      Returns true if the executed process has collected stdout.

      To collect output, process has to be configured explicitly by invoking JkAbstractProcess.setCollectStdout(boolean).

    • hasCollectedStderr

      public boolean hasCollectedStderr()
      Returns true if the executed process has collected stdErr.

      To collect output, process has to be configured explicitly by invoking JkAbstractProcess.setCollectStdout(boolean).

    • getStdoutAsString

      public String getStdoutAsString()
      Returns the output generated by the executed process as a string, assuming UTF-8 encoding.

    • getStdoutAsMultiline

      public List<String> getStdoutAsMultiline()
      Returns the output generated by the executed process as a list of strings, where each string represents a line of output. This method assumes that the output is collected and is in UTF-8 encoding.

    • getStderrAsString

      public String getStderrAsString()
      Returns the output generated by the executed process as a string, assuming UTF-8 encoding.
